title: Smart YouTube Reader Demo Digest
changes_summary: Shows a first-run proof project that teaches Smart YouTube Reader instead of relying on explanatory copy alone.
Demonstrates capture, reader context, default AI digest generation, group digest synthesis, and global Tailscale sharing.
Uses lightweight generated WebP teaching images to keep the repository small while showcasing the visual digest deliverable.
image_policy: Bundled demo digest images are novel generated WebP teaching visuals. They are examples of the default external-agent digest deliverable and are not copied from source videos.
